hero.title: Manage Your Driving School Efficiency
hero.description: Everything you need to run your driving school in one place. From student enrollment to resource management and progress tracking.

features.title: Student Tracking
features.desc: Monitor student progress, attendance, and performance in real-time.

features.title: Notifications
features.desc: Notifications for upcoming lessons, payments, and mock tests.

features.title: Resource Management
features.desc: Manage vehicles, trainers, and classrooms efficiently from one dashboard.

features.title: Mock Tests
features.desc: Create and assign mock theory tests to prepare students for the real deal.

features.title: Trainer Support
features.desc: Dedicated portals for trainers to manage their schedules and students.

hero.title: Our Mission
hero.description: Empowering driving schools worldwide with technology that simplifies management and enhances the learning experience for every student.

story.title: Built by Experts for Experts
paragraphs: Driving Sync was founded with a simple goal: to eliminate the paperwork and administrative headaches that slow down driving schools. We understand the unique challenges of managing instructors, vehicles, and student schedules.
Our team consists of industry veterans and tech enthusiasts who are passionate about road safety and educational technology. We're constantly innovating to stay ahead of the curve.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We constantly push the boundaries of what is possible in school management.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Transparency and trust are the foundation of our relationships with schools.

values.title: Impact
values.desc: We measure our success by the growth and success of the schools we serve.

header.title: Features Designed for Growth
header.description: Every tool you need to run a high-performing driving school, refined by feedback from hundreds of school owners.

features.name: Centralized Dashboard
features.desc: Get a bird's eye view of your entire school operation, from student counts to revenue trends.

features.name: Student Management
features.desc: Comprehensive profiles for every student, tracking their progress, documents, and payments.

features.name: Trainer Allocation
features.desc: Easily manage instructor schedules and assign them to students based on availability.

features.name: Notifications
features.desc: Notifications for upcoming lessons, payments, and mock tests.

features.name: Theory Mock Tests
features.desc: Customizable theory tests with real-time results to prepare students for official exams.

features.name: Progress Tracking
features.desc: Visual trackers for driving skills and syllabus completion for every student.

features.name: Mobile Friendly
features.desc: Access the entire platform from any device, anytime, anywhere.

integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.description: All our features work together perfectly. When a student progresses through a syllabus, their status is updated everywhere. When a trainer completes a lesson, attendance and performance data are synced instantly.

header.label: Contact Us
header.title: Let's scale your school's efficiency.
header.description: Our team of experts is ready to show you how Driving Sync can transform your logistics and student management through high-velocity automation.

testimonial.quote: The high-velocity onboarding experience was unparalleled. We were live in 48 hours.
testimonial.author: Operations Director
